decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_jamaica-bus-improvement-study) already matches the canonical record project_jamaica-bus-improvement-study. The observation comes from source 20110517_jamaica_open_house_posters which is listed in the registry record's source_ids. The label 'Jamaica Bus Improvement Study' matches the registry record's project_name exactly. The observation's payload (preliminary recommendations, Queens, bus circulation study) is consistent with the registry record. This observation already resolves to its base_record_id; no different canonical record to link to.
